desc_EN:
"Ain't no runners making the big bucks when they're the one's stuffing my pockets."

Lamar laughed. He thought only suckers would want to do the running themselves.
desc_CHS: 「没有探勘龙脉的扬名立万，只有买卖龙脉的交易手腕。」拉马嘲笑过我们。他觉得只有做梦的傻子才想亲自探勘。
info_EN:
Wanna flex your stuff? Ignis No.1 believes in your skills and keen intuition. This is the perfect place to experience the runner life. Current depth at 100 standard meters... deeper mysteries are just begging to be uncovered.
Encrypted Signal: Myrian Ignis Guild
info_CHS:
想要一展身手吗？大荒矿场相信您的技术与直觉，是你成为探勘人的最好体验场。
目前最大深度约为100标准尺。
待您挖掘更深的秘密。
加密单位：「万道烛龙商会」

desc_EN: East Ocean had always hoped that it could help develop Thousand Peaks. After all, East Ocean's belief in Myria Taiyang shared many similarities with Peaker beliefs, as both systems centered around lumen worship.
desc_CHS: 前往群山拓荒，一直是瀛海同盟的夙愿，毕竟光论信仰，瀛海的万道太乙，与群山的信仰本来就多有雷同，都同属龙脉崇拜的体系。
info_EN: This cave was developed by the illegal commercial entity known as the East Ocean Lumen Alliance, and was forcibly abandoned in 8518.
info_CHS: 本矿场为非法商业集团「瀛海龙脉同盟」开发，已勒令于8518年报废关闭

desc_EN:
4th year of the Lumen War
The witches officially joined the fight. With their help, every cave became a living target. United Mining slowly but surely clamped down on the Ring Liberation Front, and they had no choice but to abandon their bases.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第四年。
女巫正式加入战局，在她们的协助下，所有龙脉矿场都成为活标靶，矿业联合逐步攻陷小行星带，星环自由战线逼不得已只能放弃基地。
info_EN:
Warning: The Ring Liberation Front... c-currently... at war with United Mining... in this airspace. P-Please... leave immediately.
[Signal Source Date: 8515, Galactic Calendar]
info_CHS:
警告来往船只，本空域星环自由战线...正与..矿业联合交战中，请尽...速远离。
[讯号来源建立时间：银河历 8515 年]

desc_EN:
"Lumen is conscious. You should be able to hear many voices, but the more United Mining refines the lumen, the fainter those voices become..."

I'll never forget what Eda said as she looked at the torrents of liquid pouring down from the processing plant.
desc_CHS: 「汜能承载意念，应该能听到很多声音，但矿联加工精度越高，那声音却越来越微弱...」艾妲那时，看着加工厂的大量汜水柱倾泻而下，说了这我印象深刻的话语。
info_EN: Warning: This facility is property of United Mining. Those who have not applied for transport permits are not permitted to enter this airspace.
info_CHS: 警告：本工厂为矿联重要资产，非申报许可运输船只，请勿任意进入本工厂空域。

desc_EN: As I recall, this was the first lumen cave I set foot in since arriving in Thousand Peaks. The anxiety of knowing that it was also a pirate base did little to contain my excitement.
desc_CHS: 回想起来，那是我第一次进入群山的龙脉，尽管是黑帮的地盘，兴奋的心情掩盖了紧张的情绪。
info_EN:
Electromagnetic Scan Complete:
Potentially undiscovered cave.
info_CHS: 电磁频谱扫描确认：疑似为未发现的龙脉

desc_EN: What I remember most about being on the run was arguing with Remi every day. Now that I've gotten older... I really miss that.
desc_CHS: 逃亡那时，我印象最深刻的就是每天跟菈米亚吵架，老了后，总会特别怀念。
info_EN:
Oxygen engineering systems and the port have suffered critical damage. This trading hub will initiate forced evacuation in 16 standard hours.
Oxygen engineering systems and the port have suffered critical damage. This trading hub...
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
由于氧气工程与港口已遭受不可修复之毁损，
本贸易站将于16标准时后强行疏散...
由于氧气工程与港口已遭受...
[系统屏蔽重复信息]

desc_EN: I heard this place was established by soldiers who were injured or crippled in the Lumen War. It's also where I met the doctor.
desc_CHS: 据说是由龙脉冲突后，伤残军人们组成的居住站，我遇到医生的地方。
info_EN:
Neutral territory. Fighting is prohibited.
Ships that apply for docking should prepare to be boarded and present verification.
Discharged veterans and former Ring Liberation mercenaries can waive docking fees.
info_CHS:
中立地区，禁止私斗，
申请停泊船只将逐一登船审核。
矿联退伍军人，星环自由战线前佣兵，
可享免费停泊。

desc_EN: Never figured the first time I visited this infamous city would be to hold a space burial.
desc_CHS: 没有想到我第一次造访这著名的大黑市，竟然是为了举办宇宙葬礼。
info_EN:
By the light of Ignis, Myria everlasting... Whether you need a bionic prosthesis or illegal parts, the Silk Oasis is at your service. No docking fees required.
Encrypted Signal: Myrian Ignis Guild
info_CHS:
烛龙在上，万道日常…管你是买义体，非法组件，丝洲交易无须停泊费，只需有缘的你。
加密单位：「万道烛龙商会」

desc_EN: Of all the caves I've encountered... perhaps this one is the hardest to forget.
desc_CHS: 记忆中，我很难忘记的龙脉。
info_EN:
This cave was discovered by the Rodin family in 8529 of the Galactic calendar.
Currently supervised by the Lumen Association, it is restricted to mining and Myrian civilization research.
[Signal Source: Lumen Association]
info_CHS:
本矿脉于银河历 8529 年，由“罗登家族"所发现。
目前为龙脉协会托管，
仅供采集，万道文明研究之用。
[讯号所属：龙脉协会]

desc_EN: Because of what happened to Kay, I was really anxious at the time. I was willing to do anything for him...  Perhaps I underestimated the Peakers.
desc_CHS: 为了大魁我那时很急，管他去哪，我什么都答应，或许也太小看群山人了。
info_EN:
Electromagnetic Scan Complete:
Potentially undiscovered cave.
info_CHS: 电磁频谱扫描确认：疑似为未发现的龙脉

desc_EN: I really wanted to help Eda any way I could. She had no idea how much making me a member of the crew meant to me. At the time, I had nothing.
desc_CHS: 我希望我能帮助艾妲，她不知道接受我成为船员的一份子，对那时一无所有的我，有多大的意义。
info_EN:
Electromagnetic Scan Complete:
Potentially undiscovered cave.
info_CHS: 电磁频谱扫描确认：疑似为未发现的龙脉

desc_EN: At the time, it felt like Eda was hiding a lot from me, but after seeing vestiges of civilization that had been abandoned for tens of thousands of years, I decided to just let it go.
desc_CHS: 我当时一直认为，艾妲很多事没跟我说，但面对万年无人的遗迹，我决定把那些事放诸脑后。
info_EN:
Analysis System Error.
Unable to detect any substances.
info_CHS: 分析系统异常：无法探测到物体存在

desc_EN: Headquarters for the Lumen Association. From what I remember this was a massive city that embodied the spirit of Thousand Peaks.
desc_CHS: 龙脉协会本部的所在地，记忆中是个宛如群山这地名一般的巨大城市。
info_EN:
Lumen Association Regulation, Article 10: On Composition
"The Lumen Association is composed of different races, different religions, and different alliances. Yet we are all the same, for we are all united under the name Thousand Peaks."
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
龙脉协会公约第十条：关于组成
龙脉协会由不同人种，不同民族，不同宗教，不同联盟所组成，彼此无有不同，唯群山人民为尔。
[系统屏蔽重复信息]

desc_EN: For a while, I did my best to understand Remi. But no matter what I did, it seemed that I would always be an outsider.
desc_CHS: 我曾很努力地理解菈米亚，但或许我怎么努力，也只是外人。
info_EN:
Electromagnetic Scan Complete:
Potentially undiscovered cave.
info_CHS: 电磁频谱扫描确认：疑似为未发现的龙脉

desc_EN: This cave was surrounded by tons of space debris. Here, I saw a whole other side of Eda.
desc_CHS: 是这个满布宇宙残骸的龙脉，让我看到了艾妲的另外一面。
info_EN:
Electromagnetic Scan Complete:
Potentially undiscovered cave.
info_CHS: 电磁频谱扫描确认：疑似为未发现的龙脉

desc_EN: As one of the oldest local tribes in the solar system, Ironwind was put in power by United Mining to rule over Thousand Peaks. All matters, from cave verification to legislative affairs concerning the Peaks, were handled here.
desc_CHS: 铁岚城是为矿业联合所扶植，群山古老的地方部落，他们最终成为群山的主要统治者。举凡龙脉的认证，行星系的法务制定，都由他们处理。
info_EN:
Ironwind, the capital of peace and prosperity in Thousand Peaks. By the light of fire and iron, we shall spread the same prosperous peace to all citizens of the Peaks.
Docking ships will be asked to provide their visitor's form and wait for security inspection.
info_CHS:
铁岚城，群山繁荣与和平的首府。
在铁火于星辰闪耀下，矿联必将相同的繁荣与和平，带给群山所有居民。
停泊者请提供来访申请，并接受警卫小组检查。

desc_EN: At the time, I felt an intense sense of uneasiness that I just couldn't find the words to describe.
desc_CHS: 那时我有种强烈的不安感，无法形容。
info_EN:
——— O ———｜｜— O ——＼———
[Signal ID: United Mining Standard SOS Signal 005]
[According to the Galactic Empire Declaration of Spaceflight, all vessels are required to aid those in need]
info_CHS:
——— O ———｜｜— O ——＼———
[讯号辨识：矿联标准求救编号005]
[依照人类统合体航行宣言，所有船只都有义务援助求救者。 ]

desc_EN: If only we hadn't entered the black hole observatory that day...
desc_CHS: 如果那一天，我们没有登入黑洞观测站。
info_EN: [Space station ID code damaged. Analysis failed]
info_CHS: [空间站识别编码毁损，识别失败]

desc_EN: Remi told me that Banshee would soon leave Excidium's orbit. In standard time, it had been here for five years, but the next time that it visited the Peaks would be in several decades, maybe even a century.
desc_CHS: 透过菈米亚才知道，此时黑龙即将离开黑洞大荒的轨道，换算为烛龙恒星标准时间，于群山停留五年的黑龙，下一次来访可能是数十年，甚至会是百年后。
info_EN:
Analysis System Error.
Unable to detect any substances.
info_CHS:
分析系统异常
无法探测到物体存在

desc_EN: This old space dock is located amid the post-war, abandoned airspace and is surrounded by a fleet of recycling vessels. Next to lumen exploration, salvaging debris from the war became the second largest industry in Thousand Peaks.
desc_CHS: 老旧的太空港座落于战后的废弃空域中，周遭停满了废铁回收船，战后残骸的拾荒，是除了龙脉探索外，最大的群山产业。
info_EN:
Trash mountain, where trash turns to gold.
Trash mountain, where trash turns to gold.
Trash mountain, where trash turns to gold.
Trash mountain, where trash...
[System has filtered out repeating messages]
info_CHS:
垃圾送来垃圾山，让你的垃圾变黄金。
垃圾送来垃圾山，让你的垃圾变黄金。
垃圾送来垃圾山，让你...
[系统过滤重复信息]

desc_EN: "This place could produce a hundred lumen seeking vessels in a standard year," said Remi casually, as I stared in awe at the massive number of ships lined up along the spaceway.
desc_CHS: 「差不多一个标准年可以生产100台龙脉探测船。」当我被轨道上为数惊人的船舰震慑时，菈米亚是这么说的。
info_EN: This airspace is used for Ironwind shipbuilding purposes. There are lots of massive ships in orbit. For safety purposes, please do not interfere with the factory spaceway.
info_CHS:
本空域为铁岚城轨道造船厂所有，
轨道上多大型船舰，
请勿随意影响本造船厂航道，以策安全。

desc_EN:
1st year of the Lumen War
Unhappy with United Mining's interference in mining rights, local Peaker factions from the asteroid belt clashed with United Mining. The ruins of this conflict was purchased by the Lumen Association and turned into a memorial for the deceased.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突爆发元年。
不满矿业联合对矿权的干涉，小行星带的群山地方势力，与矿联爆发大规模冲突，留下的废墟为龙脉协会收购，作为悼念亡者的纪念塔。
info_EN:
... Age no longer, and here forever rest.
[Signal Source Date: 8529, Galactic Calendar]
info_CHS:
...他们不再老去，在此长眠。
[讯号来源建立时间：银河历 8529 年]

desc_EN:
"This cave is the pride of the Lumen Mining Act. It's the first step in reclaiming lumium refinement capabilities for Thousand Peaks."

I remember how the doctor smiled when we brought this place up, something she rarely did.

"And unlike United Mining... we'll preserve it."
desc_CHS: 「这矿场是龙脉指定法中的希望，是群山人们重新掌握汜气提炼的第一步。」记得提到这里时，医生露出少见的微笑。 「而且与矿联不同，我们会保存它。」
info_EN:
This plant was repaired in 8533, and turbine maintenance is set to begin in 8535 to ensure plant safety... Basic lumium usage conforms with the Lumen Mining Act, and is verified by United Mining.
[Signal Source: Aurora Cave Freedom Corporation]
info_CHS:
本厂机组已于银河历 8533 年重新修正，预定于 8535 年进行轮机组维护，以确保设备安全...
本厂基础汜气用量均符合「龙脉指定法」，并透过行星矿业联合查验合格。
讯号来源「朝山龙脉自由集团」所属。

name_EN: Illegal Base Station: Rabbit Hole I
desc_EN: I remember the first time I came here, all you had to do was turn on the ship's radio and the sounds of interference and advertisements would fill the air.
desc_CHS: 记得第一次经过时，船内频道只要打开，随时都 是喧闹的电波干扰跟广告声。
info_EN:
Cheap as heck and fast as hell.
All you scavengers who can't stand United Mining's ridiculous communication prices, just enter our verification...
[Signal interference. Analysis failed]
info_CHS:
费率最低，速率千兆，
受不了矿联高额通信费的拾荒人们，
欢迎输入我们的认证...
[讯号干扰，解析失败]

desc_EN: Remi once calculated how much Hybrid Lumium fuel is allocated by United Mining in one month: 60,000 barrels. Although the 99 Hybrid Lumium produced here only appears slightly different from the 98 Hybrid Lumium that Red Chamber uses, its purity and efficiency is incomparable.
desc_CHS: 一标准月能生产60000桶混合汜气燃料，菈米亚当时计算着矿业联合的配给数字，这里出产的是99级混合汜气，跟红楼使用的98级看起来只差一点，但纯度与效率是完全不可比的。
info_EN:
Ｗarning: This cave is United Mining private property.
Please leave immediately.
Ｗarning: This cave is United Mining private property.
Please leave immediately...
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
警告，本矿场为矿联私有财产，请立即返航。
警告，本矿场为矿联私有财产，请立即返航。
警告，本矿场为矿联私有财产，请立即返航。
[系统屏蔽重复信息]

desc_EN:
"Oh, it was nothing. Just nearly died, that's all."

Remi mentioned her early years of drifting without thinking much about it. During the Lumen War, most Peakers had difficult lives.
desc_CHS: 「没什么，差点活不下去而已。」菈米亚曾不经意的提到早年流浪的日子，龙脉冲突的那几年，群山人多半不太好过。
info_EN:
Warning: This is the food supply center for Thousand Peaks. Encroaching vessels that have not signed the Food Transport Agreement will be viewed as a threat to Thousand Peaks food safety...
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
警告，本区为群山粮食供应中心，未签订粮食运输合同船只接近，将视为危害群山太阳系粮食安全。
警告...本区为...
[系统屏蔽重复信息]

desc_EN: A faint light shone through the depths of the electromagnetic storm, and the specter of a factory materialized before our eyes.
desc_CHS: 电磁风暴的深处传出些许微弱光点，宛若幽灵般的工厂浮现在我们眼前。
info_EN:
"Neverlasting paths, what comes may not be what you ask, and what you ask may not come to pass."
Send thy parts beyond the gate... as we shall wait before... Allow the souls... r-return to space... here, forever more...
[Abnormal electromagnetic signals. Analysis failed]
info_CHS:
二向无常，无往而遇，遇而无往。
让零件回到门后...于门前等待下一次的相遇
...让灵魂...重回宇宙的..大..海...
[电磁讯号异常，解析失败]

desc_EN: Back then, my relationship with Remi wasn't the best, but she did take us to a lot of restricted areas when Eda gave the go-ahead. She was the best pilot I knew.
desc_CHS: 虽然那时跟菈米亚处得不好，但是她依然带着我们航入各种限制区域，只要艾妲指示，她就是最好的船师。
info_EN: Central military base for United Mining. The United Mining Corporation reserves the right to shoot down any intruders.
info_CHS:
行星矿业联合军事重地，
矿业联合有权击落非法入侵者，
切勿以身试法。

desc_EN: One of Thousand Peaks' four largest planets. Its abundant resources supply both the citizens and the military.
desc_CHS: 群山四大行星之一，丰沛的能源含量提供了民生与军需。
info_EN: Mining vessels currently in orbit, please follow the instructions provided by United Mining to safely pass through the asteroid belt.
info_CHS:
行星矿业联合公告：
于轨道绕行的采矿船只，请依照矿联当局指示的安全航道通过行星环。

desc_EN: Identified in Myrian mythology as a tranquil, green planet that erupted into windstorms resulting from Ignis' heavenly wrath. Turbulent, high-temperature cyclones can still be seen in its atmosphere to this day.
desc_CHS: 传闻神话中曾是安稳的绿色行星，却因为烛龙天的罚掀起风暴，如今大气层内是汹涌的高温气旋。
info_EN: United Mining sentry station. Please present airspace verification when approaching. United Mining reserves the right to attack intruders.
info_CHS:
矿联军事哨站，接近前请取得空域通行签证。
矿联有权击毁任何非法入侵者，切勿以身试法。

desc_EN: One of Thousand Peaks' four largest planets, and a god of the Four Peaks in the Myrian holy war. Due to its relative stability, the deuterium produced here serves as Thousand Peaks' largest energy source next to lumium.
desc_CHS: 群山四大行星，也是万道天地战争时，天上诸神之一，由于行星活动相对稳定，这里出产的重氢是除了汜气外，群山主要的能量来源。
info_EN: The mining rights to this planet belong to United Mining. Please present your excavation permit.
info_CHS: 矿业联合私有矿场行星，开采者请出具开采证明。

desc_EN: One of Thousand Peaks' four gas planets. Its violent magnetic storms made it nearly impossible to harvest anything from it. In Myrian mythology, there were once ten planets in Thousand Peaks, but internal conflict divided them, and now only four planets remain.
desc_CHS: 群山四大气体行星之一，由于电磁风暴剧烈，导致难以开采，万道神话中认为群山有十个行星，却因为内乱而导致分裂，最后仅存四大行星于现世。
info_EN:
Abnormal Electromagnetic Signals:
Planetary activity is intense and unstable.
info_CHS: 电磁波异常：行星活动强烈且不稳定

desc_EN:
"There's a voice calling out to me...
I can hear it."

Eda kept muttering to herself at the time, and it worried me.
desc_CHS: 「有声音在呼唤我...我听得到...」，艾妲那时一直自言自语，让我很担心。
info_EN:
Event Horizon Radius: 14 Std. Kilometers
Tidal Radius: 1861 Std. Kilometers. Accretion disk evident
Warning: Tidal forces will seriously affect your vessel's safety.
Please maintain a safe distance.
info_CHS:
事件地平线半径14标准里
潮汐力危险半径1891标准里；吸积盘结构明显
警告：潮汐力将严重影响航行安全
建议保持距离

desc_EN:
7th year of the Lumen War
After all the local factions had been destroyed, United Mining focused on eliminating the outside forces. First, they shut down the primary channel for incoming traffic... East Ocean's transport station. To this day, I still remember the shock I felt when I saw it for the first time.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第七年。
本地势力全面溃败后，矿业联合决心毁灭其余的外来势力，首要是封闭外来势力的交通要道——瀛海的传送港。
至今我依然很难忘记初见的震撼。
info_EN:
[Abnormal electromagnetic signals. Analysis failed]
[Please maintain a safe distance. Electromagnetic storms have reached: Level Red]
info_CHS:
[电磁讯号异常，解析失败]
请注意安全距离，电磁风暴概率落入警戒范围

desc_EN: This was where Eda and I first met. Kay wasn't too fond of them. From what I remember, the place was a bustling space station.
desc_CHS: 我遇到艾妲的地方，大魁讨厌她们，记得是个热闹的空间站。
info_EN:
Fortune 9, the most trusted choice in intergalactic trade.
Fortune 9, the most trusted choice in intergalactic trade.
Fortune 9, the most trusted choice in intergalactic trade.
Fortune 9, the most trusted choice in intergalactic trade.
Fortune 9, the most trusted choice...
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
您最可靠的贸易伙伴，九禄转运，十方宙域。
您最可靠的贸易伙伴，九禄转运，十方宙域。
您最可靠的贸易伙...
[系统屏蔽重复信息]

desc_EN: The doctor told me that even though this was the Lumen Association's cave, these past few years United Mining was giving all sorts of ridiculous excuses for buying resources at an extremely low cost, which infuriated the people.
desc_CHS: 听医生说，尽管是龙脉协会的管辖矿脉，这几年却常被矿业联合以各种名义，低价征收资源，导致很多民怨。
info_EN:
"Her flaming red eyes burn like the fire in our hearts."
Found by the Vermillion Explorers in 8530 of the Galactic calendar. Currently, it is secretly managed by the Lumen Association. The Lumen Association is in the process of applying for an excavation permit. Only plant collection and scholarly research is allowed.
info_CHS:
「她的眼眸深红，团队的野心如火。」
本矿脉于银河历8530年，由“朱红探险队"发现。
目前已由龙脉协会特别管理。
开采执照申请中，仅供植物采集，学术研究之用。

desc_EN: Despite the dangers, we looked everywhere for Banshee. Wherever there was a cave in United Mining airspace, we were there.
desc_CHS: 尽管危险，但我们四处搜寻黑龙，只要是矿业联合领空的矿脉，都很少放过。
info_EN: Excavation of this cave officially ended in 8524. Abandonment procedures have been initiated. According to United Mining law, intruders will be sentenced to a minimum of 10 standard years jail time, and their pilot's license will be permanently revoked.
info_CHS:
本矿脉已于8524年完成挖掘，进行废弃处置。
依矿联律法，擅自进入者处10标准年以上有期徒刑，并永久吊销飞船执照。

desc_EN: From here, all it took to reach East Ocean was three interstellar port transfers through the Galactic Empire. But at the time, I just couldn't bring myself to say it.
desc_CHS: 只要通过这里，于统合体内再转三次传送港，就可以回到瀛海。当时的我是说不出口的。
info_EN:
Transport applicants, present your entrance applications and visas. Prepare for examinations as laid out in United Mining Law. Please follow the instructions of the inspection crew to avoid being fined.
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
申请转运者请出示船只出入境申请和签证。
并依矿业联合法律接受临检。
请受检船只服从登鉴稽查小组指示，以免受罚。
停泊者请出示...
[系统屏蔽重复信息]

desc_EN: As more and more lumen caves were discovered, I became increasingly agitated about whether or not I should return to East Ocean.
desc_CHS: 随着一座又一座龙脉被发现，对于要不要回到瀛海，当时我很挣扎。
info_EN:
Found in 8529 by "Rainer" Sam. Currently, it is secretly managed by the Lumen Association.
The Lumen Association is in the process of applying for an excavation permit. Only plant collection and scholarly research is allowed.
info_CHS:
本矿脉于银河历8529年，由雨人"山姆"发现。
目前已由龙脉协会特别管理。
开采执照申请中，仅供植物采集，学术研究之用。

desc_EN: Under the light of Ignis, I told Eda about how Myria Taiyang was formed in East Ocean, and its relationship to Ignis. She just smiled. Having left the Witching Tower, she believed that everything is a reflection of the soul.
desc_CHS: 记得在烛龙的光辉下，我跟艾妲分享瀛海起源的万道太乙与烛龙的关联，她只是微笑，离开了巫塔的她，认为一切有为来自于内心的灵魂。
info_EN:
Discovered by "Hamster" Nomy. Pirates beware, lest the fires of Ignis scorch ye soul!
Discovered by "Hamster" Nom...
[System has blocked repeating messages]
Geologically unstable. Abandoned due to pirate activity.
info_CHS:
这是仓鼠"雷米"发现的矿脉，
请盗采者自重，烛龙之炎会将你们烧成灰！
这是仓鼠“雷米”...
[系统屏蔽重复信息]
数据显示地质不稳，判断已因盗采事件废弃

desc_EN: Whether the lumen reserves were abundant or not, any crew who found a new cave would be known throughout the galaxy. But in most cases, if a cave hadn't been plundered by pirates, it had been destroyed in the war.
desc_CHS: 不论龙脉的矿藏丰富与否，只要能找到无人发现的龙脉，名声就会响彻亚银河，但大多情况，该地点不是被盗采，就是经过战乱而废弃。
info_EN:
Esteemed traveler, this cave was discovered by Lisa's Galactic Renegades. Due to a lack of protection and related pirate activity, it was abandoned in 8531.
[System has blocked repeating messages]
Geologically unstable. Abandoned due to pirate activity.
info_CHS:
敬启收讯者，本矿由"丽莎行星探勘团"所发现。
在欠缺保护之下，已于银河历8531年，由于盗采事件废弃。
[系统屏蔽重复信息]
数据显示地质不稳：判断已因盗采事件废弃

desc_EN: You could find traces of runners in the deepest, most mysterious parts of space. I hoped one day that I would become like one of them.
desc_CHS: 再怎么神秘的空域，还是会发现探勘人的足迹无所不在，希望我也能成为那样的人。
info_EN:
"Neverlasting paths, what you ask may not come to pass. We hail from Shiratsuka, and this message was left by cave adventurer Lucidus."
Discovered in 8502, this cave has been abandoned due to pirate activity. Collapses are common. Please enter at your own risk.
info_CHS:
二向无常，无往而遇，我们来自于白冢，
这是来自龙脉探险家"多朗"的信息。
于银河历 8502 年发现本矿脉，如今已因盗采事件废弃，矿场崩塌，请探勘人自行研判风险。

desc_EN: I didn't know it at the time, but Eda was worried that one day I'd have to leave.
desc_CHS: 艾妲很担心我离开，我那时什么都不知道。
info_EN:
Found by the trading vessel Aqua Abyss in 8531 of the Galactic Calendar. Currently, it is secretly managed by the Lumen Association.
The Lumen Association is in the process of applying for an excavation permit. Only plant collection and scholarly research is allowed.
info_CHS:
本矿脉于银河历8531年，由”深水商船队“发现。
目前已由龙脉协会特别管理。
开采执照申请中，仅供植物采集，学术研究之用。

desc_EN: The radiance of Ignis can be seen in every corner of Thousand Peaks. Even though solar flares are extremely difficult to predict, the Myrian believers still go on dangerous pilgrimages, taking routes that go frighteningly close to the sun.
desc_CHS: 在群山的每个角落都能看见到烛龙的光芒，尽管闪焰预测不易，万道信徒却常会冒险航行至临近的轨道，进行危险的朝圣之旅。
info_EN:
[Star Number: Hetmis - 18a]
Possibility of solar flare storm: High.
Please maintain a safe flying distance.
info_CHS:
[恒星编码：Hetmis - 18a]
恒星闪焰发生率：高
请适度保持航行距离

desc_EN:
A cave completely depleted by United Mining.

Banshee wasn't the only place we were after. We tried to enter United Mining caves many times to search for clues concerning Eda's master. It was dangerous, but I wanted to help.
desc_CHS:
被矿业联合挖掘殆尽的龙脉。
就算不是黑龙，我们依然多次进入矿联管辖的龙脉，寻找艾妲师父的线索，尽管危险，但我希望能帮她。
info_EN: Excavation of this cave officially ended in 8526. Abandonment procedures have been initiated. According to United Mining law, intruders will be sentenced to a minimum of 10 standard years jail time, and their pilot's license will be permanently revoked.
info_CHS:
本矿脉已于8526年完成挖掘，进行废弃处置。
依矿联律法，擅自进入者处10标准年以上有期徒刑，并永久吊销飞船执照。

desc_EN:
A cave completely depleted by United Mining.

"I've heard the sound of caves dying before." That's what Eda said when she saw this place. When she was in the Witching Tower, a cave would occasionally pass along its orbit, and she would hear its decaying starsong as it was being mined.
desc_CHS:
被矿业联合挖掘殆尽的龙脉。
「我听过这龙脉垂死的声音...」艾妲看到龙脉时这么说，当年她在巫塔，当龙脉沿轨道绕行接近塔时，她不时会听到该龙脉被挖掘发出的破碎共鸣。
info_EN: Excavation of this cave officially ended in 8527. Abandonment procedures have been initiated. According to United Mining law, intruders will be sentenced to a minimum of 10 standard years jail time, and their pilot's license will be permanently revoked.
info_CHS:
本矿脉已于8527年完成挖掘，进行废弃处置。
依矿联律法，擅自进入者处10标准年以上有期徒刑，并永久吊销飞船执照。

desc_EN: The "history" of the war suggests that East Ocean's ally, the Eiffel League, slowly faded from Thousand Peaks. But what really occurred was the explosion at the East Ocean Transport Station caused an electromagnetic storm that destroyed their space station.
desc_CHS: 冲突史上，与瀛海结盟的艾菲尔同盟默默消失于群山的历史舞台，但真相是因为传送港「瀛海」的爆裂，产生的强烈的电磁风暴毁灭了他们的空间站。
info_EN:
Warning: Unregistered crew has... on 3763.5.321.4... cleared...
[Abnormal electromagnetic signals. Analysis failed]
info_CHS:
警告..不明注册船队于3763.5.321.4 时...通过...
[电磁讯号异常，解析失败]

desc_EN:
4th Year of the Lumen War
This was when the Ring Liberation Front took hold of two caves, strengthening them as a contending local faction. But like what Bones mentioned, they never thought they would encounter a fleet of witches, who crushed them instantly.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第四年。
白牙提过，当年星环由于占据两座龙脉，成为强而有力的本土势力，却没想到碰到女巫的战术中队，转眼毁灭。
info_EN:
The Ring Liberation Front... c-currently... at war with United Mining... in this airspace. P-Please... leave immediately.
[Signal Source Date: 8515, Galactic Calendar]
info_CHS:
本空域星环自由战线...正与..矿业联合交战中，请尽...速远离。
[讯号来源建立时间：银河历 8515 年]

desc_EN: I heard this place was established by soldiers who were injured or crippled in the Lumen War. It's also where I met the doctor.
desc_CHS: 据说是由龙脉冲突后，伤残军人们组成的居住站，我遇到医生的地方。
info_EN:
Neutral territory. Fighting is prohibited.
Ships that apply for docking should prepare to be boarded and present verification.
Discharged veterans and former Ring Liberation mercenaries can waive docking fees.
info_CHS:
中立地区，禁止私斗，
申请停泊船只将逐一登船审核。
矿联退伍军人，星环自由战线前佣兵，
可享免费停泊。

desc_EN:
6th Year of the Lumen War
United Mining invested heavily in military equipment and went straight after the Ring Liberation Front, nearly wiping them out. This caused the surrounding airspace to become a wasteland of space debris.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第六年。
矿业联合投入大量军力，与星环自由战线爆发大规模的会战，近乎全灭，导致周遭的空域成为宇宙垃圾横生的一片废墟。
info_EN: Thousand Peaks caves are the property of its first pioneers, the United Mining Corporation. We implore... illegal excavators to... exercise restraint and please... conduct yourselves accordingly. [Unable to identify signal]
info_CHS:
群山龙脉为第一开拓者：行星矿业联合财团所有，请…违法…开采者…自重…
[讯号无法辨识]

desc_EN:
"Remi, get a refund for Krimson Kettle."

From what I remember, Eda tried to get a refund multiple times, but Remi would simply resubscribe for another year.
desc_CHS: 「把红壶的节目退费，菈米亚。」印象中艾妲退费了很多次，然后菈米亚又会再订一年。
info_EN:
Sick of those boring, repetitive Galactic Empire programs? Sign up for a Krimson Kettle account and get 7 standard days of free...
[Ads Blocked]
info_CHS:
厌倦了千篇一律的统合体节目吗？申请红壶电台频道帐号，享有7标准天的免费鉴赏...
[广告讯号已过滤]

name_EN: Illegal Base Station: Rabbit Hole III
desc_EN: For an exile, the opaque nature of the Thousand Peaks' Rabbit Hole communication network is the safest protection against being tracked.
desc_CHS: 以流亡而言，群山透过兔窟实现的不透明网络，可以说是躲避追踪最好的庇护。
info_EN:
Cheap as heck and fast as hell.
All you scavengers who can't stand United Mining's ridiculous communication prices, just enter our verification...
[Signal interference. Analysis failed]
info_CHS:
费率最低，速率千兆，受不了矿联高额通信费的拾荒人们，欢迎输入我们的认证...
费率最低，速率千兆...
[系统屏蔽重复信息]

desc_EN:
7th year of the Lumen War
Faced with United Mining's fleet of witches, East Ocean decided to come to an agreement, hoping to hold on to their mining rights. However, these talks marked the beginning of East Ocean's demise.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第七年。
面对矿联女巫队的强力进攻，无能反击的瀛海，希望能保留矿权，决心与对方谈判，但这次谈判，却成为瀛海败亡的开端。
info_EN:
Warning: This cave is under attack by United Mining, and will soon be c-closed... All relevant personnel...
Warning: At 6 standard hours... evacuate...
[Signal error, unidentifiable]
info_CHS:
...警告...本矿场遭受矿联攻击中，即将关闭....请相关人员于六标准时...
...警告...于六标准时...撤...离....
[讯号异常无法辨识]

desc_EN: The Ring Liberation Front was a local guerrilla faction located in the Peaks. No matter how many times United Mining eradicated them, they always seemed to rise again, just like their motto: "Endless lumen, light the way, that the belt may rise again one day."
desc_CHS: 星环自由战线是群山本土的游击势力，尽管多次为矿业联合歼灭，却数次再起，如同他们常驻人心的口号：「龙脉常在，风水引路，小行星必将奋起。」
info_EN:
This city was previously a Ring Liberation Front stronghold. It was destroyed by United Mining during the Lumen War. Collapses are common, so please do not attempt excavation.
[Signal Source: Lumen War Relief Foundation]
info_CHS:
本城寨为星环自由战线前基地，已于战时遭受矿业联合摧毁，崩塌意外频仍，请勿随意探勘。
[讯号所属：冲突遗族抚恤会]

desc_EN:
6th Year of the Lumen War
Members of the Front made a last-ditch attempt to ambush a sentry station, and managed to kick United Mining out of the asteroid belt. It was a heavy price to pay, but the Peakers truly believed that the asteroid belt would rise again one day.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第六年。
星环自由战线最后一批人舍身突袭哨站，成功让矿业联合退出小行星带，尽管代价高昂，但群山人都相信，总有一天他们会如口号「小行星必将奋起。」，再次出现在人们眼中。
info_EN:
Warning: Illegal excavation of... lumen caves... is in violation of the Lumen Mining...
[Unable to identify signal]
info_CHS:
请违法...开采者...自重...盗采矿...脉违反龙脉...
[讯号无法辨识]

desc_EN:
This is where the war began.
It started with a mining strike, which arose because of complaints suggesting that United Mining was exploiting the Peakers. The corporation responded with violent suppression, resulting in countless deaths, and causing mass outcry among the Peakers, who rose up in resistance. This soon led to the establishment of the Ring Liberation Front, and conflicts between the asteroid belt and United Mining began.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突的起点。
最早是由矿场罢工开始，起因只是抱怨矿业联合剥削群山人民，却因为遭矿业联合镇压，死伤无数。
最后群山人民意沸腾，间接让星环自由战线成立，引爆小行星带与矿业联合的冲突。
info_EN:
Warning: Due to illegal activities, this cave collapsed and is no longer viable. Abandonment procedures were initiated in 8511. This is still a restricted area. No lingering allowed.
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
警告：此区域由于非法集会，矿场坍塌遭致破坏，已于8511年进行废弃处理。
本地仍为禁止进入地区，请勿在此逗留。
[系统屏蔽重复信息]

desc_EN:
15th year of the Lumen War
The last standing faction, Koomsung Transport, officially collapsed when all their scientists were arrested. By then, United Mining was in control of all provisions, aerospace technology, interstellar transport, and the entire lumen energy industry, making it the most powerful entity in the solar system.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第十五年。
最后的势力「金辰运输财团」在科学家集团被群体逮捕后正式结束。
矿联从此掌握了群山的粮食、航太、传送港、以及汜能源工业，成为无可动摇的行星系霸主。
info_EN:
Warning: The Koomsung Transport Corporation was found guilty of creating lumenide engines without the appropriate licenses and was subsequently banned in 8526. This is still a restricted area. No lingering allowed.
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
警告：金辰运输财团未经授权，私自制造汜气引擎，已于8526年查禁。
本地仍为禁止进入地区，请勿在此逗留。
[系统屏蔽重复信息]

desc_EN:
11th year of the Lumen War
The last cave of the Rumani Clan was destroyed. It was rumored that the assassination failed because the spy sent to complete the mission fell in love with the target——the chairman of Ironwind. Even to this day, the rumor can be heard in Peaker bars.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第十一年
吉普赛家族最后的矿场被毁灭。
谣传暗杀行动的失败，是因为送出的间谍爱上了任务目标——铁岚城的议长所导致，至今依然在群山的酒吧故事中流传。
info_EN:
United Mining Announcement:
This cave was illegally operated by assassins known as the Rumani Clan. Abandonment procedures began in 8521 of the Galactic calendar.
info_CHS:
行星矿业联合公告：
本矿场由暗杀集团吉普赛家族拥有，已于银河历8521年进行废弃处置。

desc_EN: I heard this place was established by soldiers who were injured or crippled in the Lumen War. It's also where I met the doctor.
desc_CHS: 据说是由龙脉冲突后，伤残军人们组成的居住站，我遇到医生的地方。
info_EN:
Neutral territory. Fighting is prohibited.
Ships that apply for docking should prepare to be boarded and present verification.
Discharged veterans and former Ring Liberation mercenaries can waive docking fees.
info_CHS:
中立地区，禁止私斗，
申请停泊船只将逐一登船审核。
矿联退伍军人，星环自由战线前佣兵，
可享免费停泊。

desc_EN: Life around the asteroid belt was not easy, and this was how Peakers managed to enjoy their otherwise painful lives. Remi loved places like this.
desc_CHS: 小行星带的群山人生活不易，这似乎是他们苦中作乐的日常，菈米亚喜欢这些地方。
info_EN:
Walk in with a hundred credits, walk out with a thousand. Change your fate and that scavenger lifestyle. Bets start at a hundred, and Myrian artifacts can be used as loans...
[Ads Blocked]
info_CHS:
百点入场，万元回手，逆转您的拾荒人生。投注最低百点起，接受万道文物估价抵押...
[系统屏蔽广告信息]

name_EN: Illegal Base Station: Rabbit Hole II
desc_EN: It must have been because of the electromagnetic interference, but we'd occasionally hear a mixture of voices, sometimes even singing. The first time we heard it, it scared Eda and I half to death.
desc_CHS: 讯号台似乎因为电磁干扰，出现混杂的人声，不时甚至有歌声传出，第一次听到时，我跟艾妲都吓到了。
info_EN:
All you... scavengers... who can't... stand United Mining's... communication prices... just enter... verification...
[Signal interference. Analysis failed]
info_CHS:
受不...了矿联高...额通...信费的拾荒人们，欢迎输...让我..们...欢迎
[讯号干扰，解析失败]

desc_EN: After the Lumen Mining Act, United Mining set up multiple sentry stations to prevent further conflict and monitor their most valuable resource, lumen.
desc_CHS: 龙脉指定法后，为了防止类似冲突，矿联陆续兴建了多个哨站，并随时监控他们最重要的资源，龙脉的矿产「汜」。
info_EN: United Mining sentry station. Present airspace verification when approaching. United Mining reserves the right to attack intruders.
info_CHS:
矿联军事哨站，接近前请取得空域通行签证。
矿联有权击毁任何非法入侵者，切勿以身试法。

desc_EN:
"I may be an orphan, but for a while I thought I was special," Eda said.

She was twelve when she entered Level 4, the youngest in the Helius tower's history. But when she returned, she was told by the elder that she had forever lost her status as a witch candidate.
desc_CHS:
「就算是孤儿，
我也以为自己是最特别的。 」艾妲说。
12岁登上四楼的她，是乙皇塔表扬女巫中，历史上最年轻的，但等她下一次回来时，她却被长老宣告永久失去女巫资格。
info_EN:
The Witching Tower has been permanently closed. Orphan services and donations are no longer accepted. Myrian funeral services have also been suspended. Oxygen in residential areas has been fully removed. No docking allowed.
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
巫塔已永久关闭，不接收孤儿与捐献，亦不再承接万道葬仪相关事务。
本站居住区空气已排空，请勿冒险尝试停泊。
[系统屏蔽重复信息]

desc_EN:
9th year of the Lumen War
After the East Ocean Transport Station was destroyed, Zhao Ghe was unable to get supplies and United Mining had sealed them off from all sides. Once a leader in lumen processing technology, they too were burned in the fires of war.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第九年。
瀛海传送港毁灭后，朝歌失去了母国的补给线，被矿业联合全面封锁，曾经掌握的汜能源转换的技术，也随战火付之一炬。
info_EN:
United Mining Announcement:
This refinery is legally designated as a public space and will be reconstructed in 8537 of the Galactic calendar. Trespassing and filming are prohibited...
info_CHS:
行星矿业联合公告：
本精炼场为法定公有地，将于银河历8537年重建，请勿随意造访，摄影...

desc_EN: This was where Eda and I first met. Kay wasn't too fond of the place. From what I remember, the place was a bustling space station.
desc_CHS: 我遇到艾妲的地方，大魁讨厌她们，记得是个热闹的空间站。
info_EN:
Fortune 9, the most trusted choice in intergalactic trade.
Fortune 9, the most trusted choice in intergalactic trade.
Fortune 9, the most trusted choice in intergalactic trade.
Fortune 9, the most trusted choice in intergalactic trade.
Fortune 9, the most trusted choice...
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
您最可靠的贸易伙伴，九禄转运，十方宙域。
您最可靠的贸易伙伴，九禄转运，十方宙域。
您最可靠的贸易伙...
[系统屏蔽重复信息]

desc_EN:
9th year of the Lumen War
The powerful lumium cannon, once the source of strength for various factions, was rendered useless once the witches entered the picture. Due to its reliance on lumen, they were able to track its location, leaving behind only ruins and debris.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第九年。
利用龙脉制作的汜气轨道炮投入实战，此种强力的武器却因为被女巫指出位置，成为多数势力的败因，如今仅存数座残骸。
info_EN:
United Mining Announcement:
Zhao Ghe Resources has been found guilty of concealing weapons and the improper use of energy resources. Industrial abandonment procedures have been initiated.
info_CHS:
行星矿业联合公告：
朝歌汜气能源集团私藏武器并进行能源的错误利用，已进行工业废弃处置。

desc_EN: The East Ocean solar system is infertile, and relied on lumen excavation to prosper. Only then were the habitable areas expanded, transforming it into the commercial alliance that it is today.
desc_CHS: 瀛海的本星系贫瘠难以维生，是靠着龙脉的挖掘致富，才渐渐扩大人类的可居住地，成为今天的商业同盟。
info_EN:
Due to constant... electromagnetic activity... this cave was closed in 8518.
[Signal error, unidentifiable]
info_CHS:
本矿场由于电磁..影响频仍，已于8518年关闭
[讯号异常无法辨识]

desc_EN:
2nd year of the Lumen War
In response to the oppression of United Mining, local guerrilla factions around the Peaks joined forces to form the Ring Liberation Front. Even though they were eventually defeated, they managed to erect a flag of resistance and hope.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第二年。
小行星带的游击势力，由于矿业联合的压迫，联合成为星环自由战线，与矿联持续作战，尽管最后以失败收场，却为之后一连串抗争竖起反抗的旗帜。
info_EN:
This city was previously a Ring Liberation Front stronghold, but due to post-war system failure, it was abandoned after excavation in 8530.
[Signal Source: Ring Liberation Front]
info_CHS:
本城寨为星环自由战线前基地，战后由于维生系统失灵，于8530年探勘后废弃。
[讯号所属：星环自由战线]

desc_EN:
"Ignis above, may your spirit go in peace, and return as light as light." 

The massive inscriptions carved into the asteroid reminded me of the Universal Flight Monument in East Ocean.
desc_CHS:
烛龙在上，愿您灵魂归去无伤，归来如光。

巨大的群山文被刻在小行星上，让我想起瀛海本土的宇宙初航纪念碑。
info_EN:
Their voices... will forever echo throughout the Peaks. Their souls... shall return to Ignis...
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
他们...的歌声，将永远于群山行星间的深谷间回荡
他们的灵魂...将回归烛龙太阳...
[系统屏蔽重复信息]

desc_EN:
"In memory of the campaign against the Rumani Clan."

United Mining always said they would bring culture to Thousand Peaks and that control of lumen resources would be open and free. However, the Peakers found these remarks hard to swallow.
desc_CHS:
「纪念吉普赛光荣讨伐战役」
「矿联为群山的住民们带来文化，让汜的能源得到合理的开放。」
矿业联合总是这么说，听在群山人耳中，应该是格外刺耳。
info_EN:
"Glory to the united. May fire and iron light the stars."
This memorial commemorates all the contributions United Mining has made to Thousand Peaks. Warning: The airspace behind this memorial belongs to United Mining. To avoid being fined, please cooperate with inspecting officers if so required.
info_CHS:
天佑矿联，愿铁火于星辰闪耀。
谨以此碑纪念矿业联合开拓群山的历史。
此纪念碑后为矿业联合直属空域，若遇临检，请务必配合登船受检，避免罚锾产生。

desc_EN: An orbit station located on the border to protect the caves and ensure that the citizens of Aurora wouldn't encroach on the airspace. United Mining pulled no stops when it came to protecting their lumen.
desc_CHS: 位于边境的轨道哨站，是用来保护龙脉，确保朝山的人不会擅闯空域，在这方面，矿联向来不遗余力。
info_EN: United Mining sentry station. Present airspace verification when approaching. United Mining reserves the right to attack intruders.
info_CHS:
矿联军事哨站，接近前请取得空域通行签证。
矿联有权击毁任何非法入侵者，切勿以身试法。

desc_EN: Orbit Sentry Station III was completed the year the Lumen Mining Act was put in place. From that day forth, besides the asteroid belt, the Peakers lost most of their spaceway freedom.
desc_CHS: 第三轨道哨站完成于龙脉指定法订立那年，从那天起，群山人除了小行星带外，丧失了大部分的航运自由。
info_EN: United Mining sentry station. Present airspace verification when approaching. United Mining reserves the right to attack intruders.
info_CHS:
矿联军事哨站，接近前请取得空域通行签证。
矿联有权击毁任何非法入侵者，切勿以身试法。

info_EN:
Unidentifiable signals of ancient origin.
Analysis is strongly recommended.
info_CHS:
无法识别的远古讯号
强烈建议进行分析

desc_EN: Every time I came here, I would think of Kay. I hope the radiance of East Ocean greeted him upon his return.
desc_CHS: 只要回到这里，我就会想到大魁，愿他能回归瀛海日照。
info_EN:
Orbit Debris Density: 0.03 Std. Square Kilometers
Today's Launch Target: XA003, GC99
Please avoid Orbit VI and VII near Ferry Point.
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
轨道垃圾密集度 0.03每平方标准里。
今日抛射目标：XA003，GC99
请行驶的飞船回避第六，第七轨道渡头轨道...
[系统屏蔽重复信息]

desc_EN: Toola—a.k.a "The Groundhog"—was the first to discover this cave. Even though it was registered with the Lumen Association, its location in the lawless asteroid belt meant that it had already been looted dry.
desc_CHS: 由发现者——土拨鼠「图拉」冠名的龙脉，尽管龙脉协会已登记此龙脉，但小行星带的治安混乱，让此地已被盗采殆尽。
info_EN:
This cave was discovered, after endless hardships, by "Groundhog" Toola in 8529 of the Galactic calendar. Led by Toola, the Groundhog Crew established itself over many years, comprised of... [System has blocked lengthy messages]
Geologically unstable. Abandoned due to pirate activity.
info_CHS:
银河历8529年，本矿场由土拨鼠"图拉"经过万难取得，图拉率领的土拨鼠是一只历史悠久的船队...组成是...
[信息过长已屏蔽]
数据显示地质不稳：判断已因盗采事件废弃

desc_EN:
A cave completely depleted by United Mining.

We weren't sure why United Mining was so actively searching for Banshee, but the excessive mining and destruction on display would suggest that their true target might be more than just minerals.
desc_CHS:
被矿业联合挖掘殆尽的龙脉。
我们不知道为何矿业联合积极探索黑龙，但超出采矿需求的过度破坏，却隐约指出他们的目标，应该不会只有矿产。
info_EN: Excavation of this cave officially ended in 8531. Abandonment procedures have been initiated. According to United Mining law, intruders will be sentenced to a minimum of 10 standard years jail time, and their pilot's license will be permanently revoked.
info_CHS:
本矿脉已于8531年完成挖掘，进行废弃处置。
依矿联律法，擅自进入者处10标准年以上有期徒刑，并永久吊销飞船执照。

desc_EN: The last sentry station that United Mining established. Almost as if they were saying even when close to the almighty Ignis, their fire and iron would burn bright.
desc_CHS: 矿业联合最后建立的轨道哨站，宛若在宣告，尽管身处烛龙的太阳，他们的铁火依然闪耀。
info_EN: United Mining sentry station. Present airspace verification when approaching. United Mining reserves the right to attack intruders.
info_CHS:
矿联军事哨站，接近前请取得空域通行签证。
矿联有权击毁任何非法入侵者，切勿以身试法。

desc_EN: We felt terribly anxious as we trespassed, as we had no idea how long our modified signals would hold out. After all, the automatic defense systems on the sentry station could incinerate us in an instant.
desc_CHS: 擅闯时我们心很忐忑，不确定我们的伪造讯号能坚持多久，毕竟哨站的自动防御系统，随时有能力将我们消灭。
info_EN: United Mining sentry station. Present airspace verification when approaching. United Mining reserves the right to attack intruders.
info_CHS:
矿联军事哨站，接近前请取得空域通行签证。
矿联有权击毁任何非法入侵者，切勿以身试法。

desc_EN: After receiving recognition from the Lumen Association, we thought we were unstoppable. Countless times, we ventured into official airspace just to get some info on Banshee. Perhaps it was this confidence that put Red Chamber in so many dangerous situations.
desc_CHS: 自从被龙脉协会表扬后，我们认为自己无所不能，为了打探黑龙的消息，甚至数度出入官方的空域，或许也是这种自信，让红楼陷入多次险境。
info_EN: Central military base for United Mining. The United Mining Corporation reserves the right to shoot down any intruders.
info_CHS: 行星矿业联合军事重地，矿业联合有权击落非法入侵者，切勿以身试法。

desc_EN:
"United Mining won't stop until they suck every asteroid dry."

The doctor once told me that in Thousand Peaks, only the Lumen Association was in the position to preserve Myrian culture.
desc_CHS: 「没把小行星掏空前，矿业联合是不会停的。」医生跟我说过，群山太阳系里，只有龙脉协会有余力思考万道的文化保存。
info_EN:
Visitors are strictly prohibited from nearing this cave. Only researchers are allowed access.
If you are a researcher, please present your research permit. The cave will send personnel to ensure the safety of the research.
info_CHS:
本矿场严禁闲杂人等接近，仅开放研究人员参访。
请访客出示 访问研究签证，
本矿场将派遣人员保障贵宾研究安全。

desc_EN:
"The lumium in this research center sounds like the wailing of souls."

That's how Eda described this place.
desc_CHS: 「研究所的汜气，声音听起来很像各种人的悲鸣。」艾妲是这么形容研究中心的。
info_EN:
Announcement: Let our research push the galaxy forward. United Mining is working hard for the prosperity and happiness of humanity.
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
行星矿业联合公告：
让研究于星火间推动银河，
为增进全体人类福祉而努力。
[系统屏蔽重复信息]

info_EN:
Regularly occurring ancient signal.
Traces of human activity detected.
info_CHS:
规律的远古讯号
疑似有人为开发的迹象

desc_EN:
7th year of the Lumen War
This Eiffel League space station malfunctioned after a massive electromagnetic storm. Scavenger ships searched for unmanned space stations like this one, hoping to find some intel they could sell on the market.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第七年。
专营矿权买卖的艾菲尔同盟，空间站随着电磁风暴而停止运作。

不少打捞船专门寻找这类漂流的无人空间站，只希望能捞到过往的一些交易情报。
info_EN:
The best deals for w-war... loans and debt... restructuring... War v-victims... qualify for the lowest interest rates...
[Abnormal electromagnetic signals. Analysis failed]
info_CHS:
提供..您最优惠的战争信..贷与债务..重组服务
冲突后...受难者可..享最低利率…
[电磁讯号异常，解析失败]

desc_EN: I never thought that I'd be saved by United Mining one day. I wonder what Eda thought about it.
desc_CHS: 没想到我有一天会被矿联所救，艾妲不知道怎么想的。
info_EN:
Warning: To all Thousand Peaks vessels, this is the outer orbit of the solar system. United Mining does not provide rescue services beyond this point
Warning: To all Thousand Peaks vessels, this is...
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
警告：群山太阳系船只，本边境以外轨道为外太阳系轨道，矿业联合不提供相关航行人道救援服务。
警告：群山太阳系...
[系统屏蔽重复信息]

info_EN:
Signal strength too weak. Identification failed.
Manual analysis recommended.
info_CHS:
讯号强度过低，尝试识别失败
建议进行主动分析

desc_EN:
15th year of the Lumen War
With the war coming to a close, United Mining suddenly demanded that their former partner Koomsung Transport turn over hybrid lumium engine technology, before destroying their lab with tactical missiles.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第十五年。
龙脉冲突即将结束，矿联突然要求过往的伙伴，金城运输财团交出混合汜气引擎的技术，并将实验室用战术飞弹破坏。
info_EN:
Warning: The Koomsung Transport Corporation has violated the Lumen Mining Act by creating lumenide engines and was banned in 8523. This is still a restricted area. No lingering allowed.
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
警告：金辰运输财团违反龙脉指定法，私自制造汜气引擎，已于8523年查禁。
本地仍为禁止进入地区，请勿在此逗留。
[系统屏蔽重复信息]

desc_EN: Mining expeditions and the flow of intel in Thousand Peaks was ten times that of East Ocean. Back then, I couldn't believe that there'd be any caves that hadn't been discovered.
desc_CHS: 群山的矿场开发与情报流通的程度是瀛海的十倍，当时我很难想像，真的会有没人发现的龙脉。
info_EN:
Legalities? Verifications? Forget about 'em. Looking for that perfect investment? Contribute your excavation equipment and a commissioned team of runners will be at your service.
Encrypted Signal: Myrian Ignis Guild
info_CHS:
无需盗采，无需审查，
渴望一夕致富的小投资？
我们为您提供最开放的探勘空间，仅需贡献您的探勘设备，委托的探勘队马上为您服务...
加密单位：「万道烛龙商会」

faction_CHS: 卓越通讯股份有限公司
desc_EN:
18th and final year of the Lumen War
Most people still remember the first message they received from Unison Telecom: "Glory to the united. May fire and iron light the stars. With the Lumen Mining Act in effect as of today, we hope to end the conflicts, and bring everlasting peace to Thousand Peaks."
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第十八年，龙脉冲突终战年。
许多人至今还记得由行星通讯局网络发出的第一封信息。
「天佑矿业联合，愿铁火于星辰闪耀，即日起实施龙脉指定法，愿群山和平，永无战争。」
info_EN:
For better network quality, Unison Telecom has completely upgraded its infrastructure in 8535.
Now, illegal messages will be automatically blocked. Please provide your vessel's proof of ownership and citizen ID to receive your free upgrade now.
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
光荣的矿业联合市民，为还给您友善的网络空间，通讯局已于银河历8535 完成网络升级，并成功屏蔽非法讯号。
请尽速提交您的船只证明与市民证，本局将主动为您提供升级服务...
[系统屏蔽广告信息]

info_EN:
This signal is coming from an untrusted network 
service provider. Accessing it may contain unforeseen risks.
info_CHS:
此讯号源由不被信任的网络服务商提供
兀自造访有不确定的风险

info_EN:
Unidentifiable signal of ancient origin.
Analysis is strongly recommended.
info_CHS:
无法识别的远古讯号
强烈建议进行分析

desc_EN: The host of this network was super famous, but nobody had a clue what they looked like.
desc_CHS: 尽管出名，但群山却没有人见过通讯社主持人的真实样貌。
info_EN:
News Flash: The new season of Opus' Astronomical Journey will soon be...
[Ads Blocked]
info_CHS:
快讯：新一季奥伯斯天文旅游即将上映...
[系统屏蔽广告信息]

desc_EN: I remember the disdainful look on their faces when I told Eda and Remi that I wanted to dock here.
desc_CHS: 记得当我说希望停泊这里时，艾妲跟菈米亚鄙弃的眼神。
info_EN:
Let Taoyuan satisfy your every desire... Here, there's nothing but love. Come, rest your weary soul. Welcome toERR023sa12...
[System Deactivated]
info_CHS:
来，让桃源乡满足你一切的需求…
这里只有爱，慰劳您旅行所有的疲劳，
欢迎莅临指名ERR023sa12...
[讯号解读关闭]

desc_EN: Kay said that we were not to go to places like this. The Lee clan never had others fight for them.
desc_CHS: 大魁说过不能来这种地方，瀛海鸢家从来不把决斗交付给人。
info_EN:
The perfect experience for those who can't forget the war. Drop that stuffy, boring life you're living. Let runner stars risk their lives just for you! Watch as they push your least favorite contender down into the abyss, falling to...
[Ads Blocked]
info_CHS:
给忘不了战争的你的最佳体验，遗忘你苦闷的生活，让著名的探勘人们为你赌命，将你讨厌的对手击落山谷，跌入...
[广告讯号已过滤]

desc_EN: Thousand Peaks is full of drifting satellites like this one. Until I saw it with my own eyes, I never knew how much suffering had been caused by the war.
desc_CHS: 群山地方充斥着类似的漂流卫星，亲眼看见后，我才知道龙脉冲突造成了多少悲剧。
info_EN: Starting from today, all non-Thousand Peaks citizens are not permitted to apply for naturalization. Military and commercial vessels are prohibited from docking.
info_CHS:
本空间站即日起，拒绝非群山公民入籍
严禁军用与商业船停泊。

desc_EN: At the beginning of our Thousand Peaks adventure, Kay and I had no choice but to run around scavenging whatever we could. He would go on about the history of the Lumen War, and how Thousand Peaks was torn apart by several factions.
desc_CHS: 群山旅行的初期，大魁与我只能四处拾荒，他不时会跟我聊到龙脉冲突的历史，那是群山被各大势力瓜分的故事。
info_EN:
This cave was severely damaged during the war. Access is restricted for an indefinite period of time.
[Signal Source: Lumen Association]
info_CHS:
本矿场已于冲突时期破坏，无限期关闭。
[讯号所属：龙脉协会]

info_EN:
Signal Confirmed: Thousand Peaks planetary signal. 
Analysis available.
info_CHS:
确认讯号为群山行星所属
可进行分析

desc_EN:
"By the light of Ignis, Myria everlasting."

Whenever I'm in Ignis airspace, I think of how the Myrian Ignis Guild would greet us. Much like East Ocean greetings, they show a profound respect for the sun.
desc_CHS: 「烛龙在上，万道日常」行经烛龙空域时，我会想起万道烛龙商会的问候语，与瀛海相似，都表现出对太阳的崇拜。
info_EN:
Frequent solar flares and unstable electromagnetic fields. Please maintain a safe distance.
Stellar magnetic cycle: 42 Std. Years
Coronal projection rate: 3.7x / Std. Days
Largest solar flare recorded: 5.23 x 10^27 Joules
info_CHS:
恒星闪焰频繁，电磁场不稳，请保持适当距离。
恒星磁场周期：42 标准年 [目前处于恒星极大期]
日冕物质抛射频率：3.7 次 / 标准天
最大闪焰能量纪录：5.23 x 10^27 焦耳

desc_EN:
"Glory to the united. May fire and iron light the stars. In memory of our fallen heroes."

The doctor sneered at the name, saying what the memorial represented was anything but grand. She never forgot the day that she and Red were ordered to shoot down a Zhao Ghe civilian ship.
desc_CHS:
「天佑矿联，愿铁火于星辰闪耀，谨纪念逝去的矿业联合勇者。」

最不光荣的纪念塔，医生这么说，她忘不了当年跟艾妲的师父，在这里被要求以扫荡为名，击沉了朝歌的民间船。
info_EN:
Glory to the united. May fire and iron light the stars. This memorial was erected in memory of warriors who have passed: Andreau, Talos...
[Lengthy message, names have been blocked]
info_CHS:
天佑矿联，愿铁火于星辰闪耀。
谨纪念逝去的矿业联合勇者...
奥德罗
托尔
...
[信息过长，系统屏蔽死者名单]

desc_EN:
A cave completely depleted by United Mining.

We took great risks at the time to search United Mining's caves, but more often than not we were greeted with the colossal, barren husks of what were once Myrian ruins.
desc_CHS:
被矿业联合挖掘殆尽的龙脉。
当时我们冒着风险，搜寻矿业联合的龙脉，最后看到的往往是巨大无比，被淘空的废墟。
info_EN: Excavation of this cave officially ended in 8529. Abandonment procedures have been initiated. According to United Mining law, intruders will be sentenced to a minimum of 10 standard years jail time, and their pilot's license will be permanently revoked.
info_CHS:
本矿脉已于8529年完成挖掘，进行废弃处置。
依矿联律法，擅自进入者处10标准年以上有期徒刑，并永久吊销飞船执照。

name_EN: Mt. Aurora Cave: West Mount Tonitrus
desc_EN: When I saw that the Lumen Association was pouring investments into operating caves, I realized that they were more than just an arbiter for disputes, they were a powerful commercial entity on the rise.
desc_CHS: 直到看见龙脉协会转投资经营的矿场，我才渐渐了解，协会不只是民间仲裁机构，本质是新兴的商业集团。
info_EN:
Construction area. Those without a Lumen Association permit are restricted from entering.
Project Name: Lumen Cave Development Project Phase 1
Supervisor: United Mining Corporation
Contractor: Aurora Cave Freedom Corporation
info_CHS:
工程用地，未持有龙脉协会探勘人证明请勿擅入。
工程名称：龙脉矿场开发计划第一期工程。
监造单位：「行星矿业联合集团」
施工单位：「朝山龙脉自由集团」

desc_EN: We tried to enter United Mining caves multiple times, and each time we barely escaped with our lives.
desc_CHS: 我们试图进入过多次矿联的龙脉，每次都生死一线。
info_EN: Excavation of this cave officially ended in 8518. Abandonment procedures have been initiated. According to United Mining law, intruders will be sentenced to a minimum of 10 standard years jail time, and their pilot's license will be permanently revoked.
info_CHS:
本矿脉已于8518年完成挖掘，进行废弃处置。
依矿联律法，擅自进入者处10标准年以上有期徒刑，并永久吊销飞船执照。

desc_EN: I never thought that we would find traces of runners in such a remote airspace. Even though Eda kept telling me not to give up, it was really hard to stomach.
desc_CHS:
我没有想到，连如此偏僻的幽暗空域，也会有探勘人的足迹。
尽管艾妲叫我不要灰心，依然很难接受。
info_EN:
Discovered by "The Drifter" Xida in 8528 of the Galactic calendar. Currently, it is secretly managed by the Lumen Association.
The Lumen Association is in the process of applying for an excavation permit. Only plant collection and scholarly research is allowed.
info_CHS:
本矿脉于银河历 8528 年，由漂浮者"西塔"所发现
目前已由龙脉协会特别管理。
开采执照申请中，仅供植物采集，学术研究之用。

desc_EN: United Mining built this sentry station later in the war, and used it as a military base for controlling the Witching Tower. Eda said she once looked out of the tower, and saw the lights of ships on patrol.
desc_CHS: 矿业联合晚期建立的哨站，用于控制巫塔的军事据点，艾妲说，她曾经从塔的窗外，看到舰队于此巡逻的光。
info_EN: United Mining sentry station. Present airspace verification when approaching. United Mining reserves the right to attack intruders.
info_CHS:
矿联军事哨站，接近前请取得空域通行签证。
矿联有权击毁任何非法入侵者，切勿以身试法。

desc_EN:
11th year of the Lumen War
The Rumani Clan's failed assassination led to a final showdown with United Mining. Inexperienced as they were at war, their military satellite was quickly destroyed and the clan was no longer a viable faction.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第十一年
暗杀计划失败的吉普赛家族与矿联陷入最后决战，不擅战争的他们，军事卫星被转眼摧毁，终于完全退出战局。
info_EN:
Comrades, the Rumani Clan... hereby calls upon you...  so that we may ensure the songs of witches are lost forever in... the depths of space...  and the war-mongering United Mining is overturned...
[Weak signal. Analysis failed]
info_CHS:
...同胞们，吉普赛家族于...此呼吁...让女巫的歌声眠于星海，一同扳倒矿业联合的战锤...
[讯号残缺，无法分析]

desc_EN:
10th year of the Lumen War
Remnants of this housing satellite still float through space. Survivors say that before it was destroyed, United Mining flew in to rescue the illegitimate daughter of the chairman and Rumani spy. Remi refused to comment on the rumor.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第十年
居住卫星的残骸依然漂流在宇宙中，幸存的遗民们常说，这里被矿业联合毁灭前， 有数艘矿联的船舰进行接驳，将间谍与议长的私生女救出，菈米亚对这故事不置可否。
info_EN:
As a member of the... Galactic Empire... We must... reiterate our... appeal to peace and...
[Weak signal. Analysis failed]
info_CHS:
身为人类统合体的一...份子，我们必...须于此时重申我们的和..平诉求...
[讯号残缺，无法分析]

desc_EN:
10th year of the Lumen War
After the collapse of Zhao Ghe, the remaining factions became increasingly wary. The Rumani Clan offered caves to United Mining, hoping to assassinate a top official during a ceremony. The failed mission resulted in the annihilation of both the clan and the caves.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第十年
朝歌能源集团溃败后，其余的势力都很紧张，吉普赛家族试图以特殊的手段解决问题，他们献上矿场，并希望于交接仪式暗杀对方，却以失败告终，矿场也遭对方毁灭。
info_EN:
The Rumani... Clan... welcomes.. all peaceful travelers... Let us... leave the wars to the god of wine... and the pantheon of deities...
[Weak signal. Analysis failed]
info_CHS:
吉普...赛家族欢迎..和平到...来的旅人，让我...们把所有冲突..留给酒神...与银河诸神。
[讯号残缺，无法分析]

desc_EN:
5th year of the Lumen War
Bones and the Front launched a surprise attack,  taking over their opponent's farm. Now heroes within the asteroid belt, they thought their supply issues were resolved. They didn't expect United Mining to blow up the farm... or the stalemate that ensued.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第五年。
白牙所属的星环自由战线，发动了成功的突袭作战，占领了对方的粮食农场，成为小行星带的英雄，原以为可以透过农场自给自足，却没想到对方选择将农场爆破，导致战事胶着。
info_EN:
To improve the food shortage in Thousand Peaks, this farm was established by United Mining in 8514 of the Galactic calendar. From this day forth, the following activities are strictly prohibited...
[Signal Lost]
info_CHS:
为改善群山民生粮食问题，本农场已于银河历8514年由「行星矿业联合」建立，即日起禁止表列相关活动...
[讯号中断]

desc_EN:
16th year of the Lumen War
Unable to resist the pressure from the people, the Witching Tower was disbanded. Of the 9 Levels within the Tower, Levels 7 to 9 were for the gods, and only witches could enter Level 5. This was where Eda met her master. She spoke at length about her past here as she walked through the ruins.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第十六年。
不敌民间压力，巫塔遣散。
废墟的塔有九楼，七楼以上是由神所居住，而五楼唯有女巫才可以进去，当年艾妲是在这里遇到她的师父。
当时艾妲走在如废墟般的塔中，说了很久的过往。
info_EN:
The Witching Tower... will be closed... in three days... Civilian ships should f-follow... the United Mining... commander's instructions... and do not attempt to block the w-witches'... peaceful exit.
[Weak signal. Analysis failed]
info_CHS:
巫塔...即将于三日后...关闭。请民间船只...接受矿联...现场指挥官指示，不要阻碍女巫...和平撤离。
[讯号残缺，无法分析]

desc_EN: On this tiny space station, many Thousand Peaks orphans completed their only formal education.
desc_CHS: 在这间小小的空间站中，许多群山的孤儿完成了他们仅有的正规教育。
info_EN:
Through the deepest valleys we have traveled, seeking light at the end of the cave. Forget the sorrows of war, and help these lost children find a home. If visitors would like a meeting, please register at...
[Ads Blocked]
info_CHS:
走过幽谷深壑，只求龙脉尽头有光。
遗忘战争的痛苦，让迷路的孩子有个家。
访客如需面会，请先行预约...
[系统屏蔽广告信息]

desc_EN: I remember Remi telling me to get rid of my old synthescepter. I knew she was doing it on purpose and we got into a big argument about it.
desc_CHS: 记得来这里时，菈米亚叫我把手边的仿声器换掉，我知道她故意的，因此跟她吵了一架。
info_EN:
"All water flows to the sea, but how it's used depends on thee." Luma Caverna provides military-grade fuel and armor coating materials.
[Ads Blocked]
info_CHS:
海纳百川，事在人为，
龙洞化工给你最好的军用燃料与装甲涂装。
海纳百川，事在人为...
[系统屏蔽广告信息]

desc_EN: The first time we came here, I thought we'd discovered a cave. All I got was Remi silently reminding how stupid she thought I was.
desc_CHS: 第一次看到这里时，我还以为找到龙脉，只被菈米亚默默啐了一声。
info_EN:
Thanks to our biggest donor this year: James Wong.
Lumen of the Peaks, flow without end. May the fires of Myrian civilization burn brighter by the day. This foundation was set up by the Rodin family...
[Ads Blocked]
info_CHS:
感谢年度捐款人：詹姆斯，王。
群山龙脉，川流不止，万道的文明之火携手相传
本基金会由罗登家族建立..
[系统屏蔽广告信息]

info_EN:
Abnormal warning signal within United Mining airspace.
Please proceed with caution.
info_CHS:
矿联空域异常警告讯号
前往请务必警戒

info_EN:
Standard Thousand Peaks civilian signal confirmed.
Proceed ahead with ease.
info_CHS:
确认讯号为群山民间标准讯号
可安心前往

info_EN:
Signal Confirmed: Standard United Mining signal. 
Please confirm airspace authorization before proceeding ahead.
info_CHS:
确认讯号为矿业联合标准讯号
前往请务必确认持有合法空域签证

desc_EN: Due to injuries from the Lumen War, many people here were only able to keep living after being fitted with bionic prostheses. When we first arrived, Eda and I had no idea how many people we met were part machine.
desc_CHS: 由于龙脉冲突造成的伤害，许多人是依靠义体才重新回归了生活，刚来时，我跟艾妲都没有很确定，我们遇到的这些人，有多少部位是机械。
info_EN: In order to address the prosthetic arm parts shortage, joint repair service is no longer available. Customers with a Lumen War Relief Foundation certification, please take a number and wait to be served.
info_CHS: 高出力作业手臂零件短缺，即日起停止人工关节维修服务，若持有遗族抚恤会资格证明者，请依序号排队等待。

desc_EN:
13th year of the Lumen War
After the outside forces were nearly eliminated, United Mining cast their focus on the witches, denouncing and defaming them. Unity News Channel 79 was the driving force behind the defacement of countless witches, including Eda's master.
desc_CHS:
龙脉冲突第十三年。
外来势力近乎被全数歼灭，矿业联合开始操作谴责巫塔的舆论，以79号统合新闻台为首，成功抹黑了无数女巫，包含艾妲的师父。
info_EN:
The voice of the people, the latest and most reliable information. Here, you'll learn all the latest news regarding asteroids and bustling space stations. Thousand Peaks' most trusted news source.
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
代表人民的心声，传递正确的信息，介绍迷人的小行星和繁华的空间站，群山最公正的新闻台。
[系统屏蔽重复信息]

desc_EN: The first time we came here, the atmosphere on Red Chamber was pretty heavy. Everyone was in their own heads, and it was affecting the whole crew.
desc_CHS: 我们第一次来到这里时，所有人各怀心思，红楼的气氛并不好。
info_EN:
Warning: You have entered the airspace of the Lumen Association. If your vessel is not registered, please leave the airspace immediately.
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
敬告空域的飞船只：
您已进入龙脉协会的管辖空域，
若非相关登记船只，请尽速离开。
[系统屏蔽重复信息]

desc_EN:
"You only care about caves, not Banshee."

Remi would always pick on me when I was reading the Daily Lumen.
desc_CHS: 「你关心的是龙脉，并不是黑龙的消息。」当我阅读龙脉日报时，菈米亚时常碎嘴我。
info_EN:
News Flash: Amendment 3 of the Lumen Mining Act has entered the Ironwind Council, emphasizing the importance of protecting the environment.
News Flash: Amendment 3 of the Lum...
[System has blocked repeating messages]
info_CHS:
快讯：龙脉指定法第三修正案已进入铁岚城市议会，强调尊重环境保护需求。
快讯：龙脉指定法第三...
[系统屏蔽重复信息]
